## Find your center on the water’s edge

## Find Your Center on the Water’s Edge

## Experience sophisticated waterside living with private boat slips,  set within the prestigious Bay Harbor Islands of Miami.

## Experience sophisticated waterside living with private boat slips, set within the prestigious Bay Harbor Islands of Miami.

![](https://9900west.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/03/Mask-group-4.png)

## The Building

A limited collection of just 23 _two, three and four-bedroom_ luxury waterside residences, along with private penthouses featuring exclusive rooftop terraces.

[LEARN MORE](https://9900west.com/the-building/)

## The Residences

Light-filled interiors finished in a timeless neutral palette and appointed with premium fittings, fixtures, and appliances.

[VIEW MORE](https://9900west.com/the-residences/)

![](https://9900west.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/THG99_03_Living_PH3_High_4-low-1024x640.jpg)

![](https://9900west.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/04/Neighborhood_Hero-1024x533.jpg)

## The Neighborhood

A charming residential island enclave with effortless access to luxury shopping, gourmet dining, and pristine Atlantic Ocean beaches.

[EXPLORE](https://9900west.com/the-neighborhood/)

## The Lifestyle

Amenities to elevate every moment at home, complemented by endless opportunities to experience the best of culture and nature.

[DISCOVER](https://9900west.com/the-lifestyle/)

![](https://9900west.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/04/9900_EXTERIOR-POOL-14_VIEW-1-scaled-e1681416133632-1024x532.jpg)
